label: 2325 Definition

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–322, title XXV, § 250001108 Stat. 2081Sept. 13, 1994“This Act [probably should be “title”, meaning title XXV (§§ 250001–250008) of , which enacted this chapter, amended sections 1029, 1341, and 3059 of this title, and enacted provisions set out as notes under this section and , Judiciary and Judicial Procedure] may be cited as the ‘Senior Citizens Against Marketing Scams Act of 1994’.”Pub. L. 103–322section 994 of Title 28

Information Network, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–322, title XXV, § 250008108 Stat. 2088Pub. L. 104–294, title VI, § 604(b)(29)110 Stat. 3508Sept. 13, 1994Oct. 11, 1996“(a).—HotlineThe Attorney General shall, subject to the availability of appropriations, establish a national toll-free hotline for the purpose of—“(1)providing general information on telemarketing fraud to interested persons; and“(2)gathering information related to possible violations of provisions of law amended by this title [see Short Title note above].“(b).—Action on Information GatheredThe Attorney General shall work in cooperation with the Federal Trade Commission to ensure that information gathered through the hotline shall be acted on in an appropriate manner.”

children.label: B
children.text: participation in a contest or sweepstakes;

children.label: C
children.text: a charitable contribution, donation, or gift of money or any other thing of value;

children.label: G
children.text: participation in a fraudulent medical study, research study, or pilot study,

children.label: A
children.text: contains a written description or illustration of the goods, services, or other opportunities being offered;

children.label: B
children.text: includes the business address of the solicitor;

children.label: C
children.text: includes multiple pages of written material or illustration; and

children.label: D
children.text: has been issued not less frequently than once a year,
